steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage explains that HILDA is expensive because it is a longitudinal study tracking economic well-being trends that take a long time to develop, requiring sustained funding over many years. The correct choice must match this specific reason for the high cost.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: discusses marketing studies or a different context unrelated to why longitudinal economic research is costly. ✗
  • Choice B: questions the sample size, which is not the reason given in the passage for the expense. ✗
  • Choice C: states that long-term trends in economic well-being cannot be identified without collecting data over many years — directly matching the passage's explanation of why sustained funding is needed. ✓
  • Choice D: claims trends can be observed quickly, which contradicts the passage's reasoning. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
